paragraphs.text: I am Alec, and I run Ackvyn Web Studio from Fairfield, Maine. I focus on helping businesses across Mid-Maine and surrounding communities get a clean, reliable website without the overhead of big agencies or bloated builders.

I have spent years across the technology industry—technical support, systems administration, networking, self-hosted infrastructure, and software development. Web design grew naturally out of that background.

I use modern tools and workflows to deliver custom websites efficiently while holding a high standard of quality. Instead of fighting rigid drag-and-drop builders, I focus on lightweight, tailored solutions that give your customers confidence from the first visit.

My goal is not to build a massive agency or sell features you do not need—it is to help local businesses establish a reliable, professional online presence that works. If you are outside the area and it is a good fit, I am happy to talk as well.
